# Interior Business Website - Project Instructions

This is a React + Vite website for an interior design business. The site includes a home page, contact popup form with WhatsApp integration, testimonials, project gallery, and video links.

## Project Setup Checklist

- [x] Project requirements clarified: React + Vite website for interior business
- [x] Project scaffolded with React + Vite
- [x] Customized with business sections (home, projects, testimonials, videos, contact)
- [x] WhatsApp lead capture integrated
- [ ] Node.js and npm installed
- [ ] Dependencies installed
- [ ] Development server running
- [x] Documentation complete

## Key Features

- Responsive design for mobile and desktop
- Home section with brand intro
- Project gallery with image cards
- Testimonials section
- Video links section
- Contact popup form with WhatsApp integration
- Low-cost hosting ready for Vercel/Netlify

## Hosting & Domain

- Free hosting option: Vercel or Netlify
- Custom domain: Point your domain registrar DNS to the hosting provider
- Initial cost: ~$10-15/year for domain only

## Commands

```bash
npm install          # Install dependencies
npm run dev          # Start development server
npm run build        # Build for production
npm run preview      # Preview production build locally
```
